overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with glowing pink socks and a white hat walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates wet streets, crosses intersections, walks through covered underpasses, and explores a vibrant commercial district with heavy neon signage and moderate vehicle traffic.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city intersection at night with wet reflective streets. The character stands near a red pedestrian signal structure before walking onto a broad yellow crosswalk. Neon-lit buildings line the street while sparse pedestrians occupy the sidewalks.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk next to a building featuring a prominent COLA advertisement with green neon trim. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding lights as the character approaches and enters a dark underpass. Vehicles drive past on the adjacent road.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit concrete underpass with overhead fluorescent lighting. The wet floor reflects the lights as the character approaches the bright exit, where a distinctive circular building with pink neon accents becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with circular building and heavy neon signage

turning right to follow street along commercial buildings with overhead walkways

notable_agents.action: walking in red jacket crossing the plaza
walking alongside ego through the commercial area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a vibrant plaza dominated by a distinctive circular building with pink-lit columns. The area is filled with moderate crowds of pedestrians and overhead neon signs. The character turns right to follow the street lined with commercial establishments.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and elevated pedestrian walkways

events.description: entering another covered section under building overpass with dimmer lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along commercial street passing various shops and illuminated signs

entered.detail: shops with illuminated window displays and neon signage
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial street lined with shops featuring bright neon signage. An elevated pedestrian walkway spans the street overhead. The scene transitions as the character enters another covered underpass area, leaving the open plaza behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway leading to intersection with traffic signals

agents.ego_description: walking through underpass and stopping at crosswalk to wait for vehicles to pass

notable_agents.action: futuristic gray sedan driving through the intersection

distinctive circular building with pink lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered walkway and emerges at a crosswalk, stopping to wait for traffic. A red pedestrian signal structure stands on the right while vehicles pass through the intersection. The circular plaza building is visible again in the distance, suggesting the character has walked in a loop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a wet street intersection through a dark underpass and into a vibrant commercial plaza. It begins at a rainy intersection where the character crosses a broad yellow crosswalk beneath the glow of towering neon buildings. As the character moves along a covered sidewalk past a green-trimmed COLA advertisement, the scene shifts into a dimly lit concrete underpass with fluorescent overheads that reflect off the damp floor. The camera then emerges from the darkness into a bright, open plaza dominated by a circular building with pink-lit columns and bustling crowds before turning right toward a commercial street spanned by an elevated pedestrian walkway. Finally, the character passes through another covered area and returns to a crosswalk, where the distant circular building reappears as they wait for traffic to pass.
